dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4076 IS: Removing Medicare Mental Health Inpatient Limitations Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Cassidy (for himself, Ms. Collins, and Ms. Smith) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend title XVIII of the Social Security Act to eliminate the 190-day lifetime limit on inpatient psychiatric hospital services under the Medicare Program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Removing Medicare Mental Health Inpatient Limitations Act of 2026.

section.header: Elimination of 190-day lifetime limit on inpatient psychiatric hospital services

subsection.text: Section 1812 of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395d) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (1), by adding or at the end;
in paragraph (2), by striking ; or at the end and inserting a period; and

paragraph.text: in subsection (c), by striking (but shall not be included and all that follows before the period at the end.

subsection.text: The amendments made by subsection (a) shall apply to items and services furnished on or after January 1, 2027.
